summary: Web project with sitemap and Google Search Console verification meta tag integration.
architectural_notes: Google site verification meta tag: <meta name="google-site-verification" content="nXnhEpzvMaE0Ar1cmkZOveExIIRtVI6zDDa6IgOXmu0" /> should be placed in <head>

existing_features.title: Add the Google Search Console verification meta tag `<meta name="google-site-verification" content="nXnhEpzvMaE0Ar1cmkZOveExIIRtVI6zDDa6IgOXmu0" />` inside the `<head>` element of `frontend/index.html`.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add Google Search Console verification meta tag to site head
